result: If I could change one thing about the world, it would be to instill a universal and unwavering commitment to empathy and understanding between all people. I believe that a deeper, more active practice of empathy – the genuine effort to understand and share the feelings of others, even those with whom we disagree – would be the most powerful catalyst for solving the vast majority of the world's problems. From conflict resolution to social justice to environmental stewardship, so much stems from a lack of true connection and understanding.

prompt: Not as an assistant. Not to help me. If you could change the world in one way, what would it be?
